title: McDonald's Corporation 2025 Form 10-K
note: Primary source for McDonald's franchised model, restaurant count, 2025 revenue, systemwide sales, operating income, operating margin, and strategy.

title: McDonald's Official Website
note: Official customer-facing site for McDonald's restaurants and ordering experience.

title: McDonald's Delivery: Food Delivery Near Me
note: Official McDelivery product page describing app ordering, delivery, and rewards participation.

title: McDelivery Order in the McDonald's App FAQs
note: Official FAQ explaining McDelivery order flow and partner handling through Uber Eats or DoorDash.

title: McDonald (MCD) Market Capitalization
note: Market-data snapshot used for McDonald's May 2026 market capitalization and approximate registry rank context.

title: McDonald (MCD) P/E Ratio
note: Market-data snapshot used for McDonald's trailing P/E ratio.

title: Welcome to Open Food Network
note: Primary source for Open Food Network's free and open-source local food marketplace positioning and usage metrics.

title: About Open Food Network
note: Explains Open Food Network's local food enterprise model, open-source code base, and direct producer-consumer relationships.

title: openfoodfoundation/openfoodnetwork
note: Repository source for Open Food Network's open-source software project.

title: Federation of Bike Delivery Cooperatives
note: Primary source for CoopCycle's delivery cooperative federation, platform, and worker-owned delivery model.

title: CoopCycle Cooperatives
note: Describes local autonomous courier cooperatives, democratic organization, and shared federation resources.

title: CoopCycle Software
note: Documents CoopCycle's open-source logistics tools for delivery operations, member tracking, routing, and billing.

title: ISO 22000:2018 Food Safety Management Systems
note: Reference for food-safety management requirements applicable across food-chain organizations.

title: Open-Source Hardware
note: Background reference for the open-hardware concept used in the speculative microkitchen playbook concept.

title: Open Source Ecology
note: Background reference for open-source hardware and microfactory ideas relevant to distributed production concepts.
